name: night_line
description: AI companion phone service — late-night conversations with persona-driven characters

variableDeclarations.name: caller_profile
variableDeclarations.description: JSON string with caller memory: caller_id, call_count, facts map, recent_turns

variableDeclarations.name: _initialized
variableDeclarations.description: Turn guard flag — set to 'true' after first init. STRING type because platform BOOLEAN accessed as string

variableDeclarations.name: persona_id
variableDeclarations.description: Active persona identifier: luna, viktor, or sol

variableDeclarations.name: caller_id
variableDeclarations.description: E.164 phone number injected by CXAS telephony layer
